footer_text: CSS Toolkits — Open source CSS generators & utilities

home.hero_subtitle: Free online toolkits with multiple CSS tools and utilities.

gradient.title: CSS Gradient Generator
gradient.description: Generate linear and radial CSS gradients with a live preview and one-click copy.

shadow.title: CSS Box Shadow Generator
shadow.description: Build layered box shadows with full control over offset, blur, spread and color.

border_radius.title: CSS Border Radius Generator
border_radius.description: Craft any shape by controlling each corner's radius independently with live preview.

text_shadow.title: CSS Text Shadow Generator
text_shadow.description: Add depth and style to text with customizable layered text shadows.
